diagnostics.message: Preheater Feed is missing temperature specification.
The current outlet response may still be influenced by upstream uncertainty, so the heater effect is not yet confirmed as a separate root cause.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-multi-selection-single-actionable-target-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","confidence":0.75,"summary":"针对选中的 Preheater Feed 流（feed-6）缺少温度规格的错误，生成候选编辑提案以补全必要参数；Heater 单元的警告因证据不足暂不生成可执行 patch。","answers":[{"text":"检测到 Preheater Feed 流缺少温度规格（error），已生成候选编辑补全该参数；Heater 单元的警告涉及上游不确定性，当前证据不足以生成具体修改建议。","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]}],"issues":[{"code":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING","message":"Preheater Feed is missing temperature specification.","severity":"error","target_type":"stream","target_id":"feed-6","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"kind":"candidate_edit","title":"补全 Preheater Feed 温度规格","target":{"type":"stream","id":"feed-6"},"rationale":"流 feed-6 作为 Preheater 的进料，当前仅指定了压力（205 kPa），缺少温度规格导致求解器无法确定热负荷计算基准。根据典型预加热工艺，进料温度通常低于目标出口温度 145°C，建议添加温度占位符待确认。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"specs":{"temperature_c":{"value":null,"placeholder":"待确认：建议根据上游来源设定典型进料温度（如 25-60°C）","unit":"°C"}}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","type":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[0]"},{"id":"diag-2","type":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[1]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-1","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.streams[0]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-2","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.streams[1]"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.units[0]"},{"id":"snapshot-1","type":"snapshot","ref":"latest_snapshot"}],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对选中的 Preheater Feed 流（feed-6）缺少温度规格的错误，生成候选编辑提案以补全必要参数；Heater 单元的警告因证据不足暂不生成可执行 patch。

answers.text: 检测到 Preheater Feed 流缺少温度规格（error），已生成候选编辑补全该参数；Heater 单元的警告涉及上游不确定性，当前证据不足以生成具体修改建议。

issues.message: Preheater Feed is missing temperature specification.
The current outlet response may still be influenced by upstream uncertainty, so the heater effect is not yet confirmed as a separate root cause.

proposed_actions.title: 补全 Preheater Feed 温度规格
proposed_actions.rationale: 流 feed-6 作为 Preheater 的进料，当前仅指定了压力（205 kPa），缺少温度规格导致求解器无法确定热负荷计算基准。根据典型预加热工艺，进料温度通常低于目标出口温度 145°C，建议添加温度占位符待确认。
